description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & publish PyPI packages that triggers on push of tags matching v[0-9]+.** and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have four jobs: build-sdist to create a source package, build to create wheels for multiple Python versions and OS environments, make_sdist to create another source distribution, and two upload jobs to Test PyPI and PyPI respectively, each dependent on the build and make_sdist jobs.
